ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of lines to scroll off the edge of the screen
ast.target: 滚动到屏幕边缘的行数

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable mod-d to select word under cursor, and multiple press to select multiple words.
ast.target: 启用 mod-d 选择光标下的单词，多次按下可选择多个单词。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: ⚠️ the mod-d hotkey must be disabled in Obsidian's hotkey settings first for select word under cursor to work.
ast.target: ⚠️ 要使选择光标下的单词功能生效，必须先在 Obsidian 的快捷键设置中禁用 mod-d 快捷键。
